title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> If yes, should there be a weekly cap?
content:
✔ If yes, should there be a weekly cap?

2. Should students be able to “trade” XP in specific situations (e.g., gifting XP to help a struggling classmate)?

✔ If so, should this be limited to once per semester?

3. Should the “Whole Class Ending” require every student to participate, or just a majority?

✔ Would requiring full participation make it too difficult?

🚀 Version 6.1 now finalizes XP tracking, alignment management, and multi-tiered True Endings.
🔥 Are we locking this in? 🎮📖

📌 Version 6.2 – XP Redemption System, Sacrificial Trades, Whole Class Jury System for True Ending


🚀 This iteration finalizes XP as a currency for in-class perks, introduces risk/reward sacrificial XP trades, and ensures the True Ending functions as a full-class jury system.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 260 (chunk 260/555)
